name: Golan Plastic Products Ltd.
summary: Golan Plastic Products Ltd engages in the production and sale of PE-Xa piping solutions under the Pexgol name worldwide. The company provides pipes, fittings, and accessories. It serves the mining, industrial, infrastructure, residential, oil and gas, and aquaculture sectors. Golan Plastic Products Ltd was founded in 1964 and is based in Sha'ar HaGolan, Israel. Golan Plastic Products Ltd operates as a subsidiary of Kibbutz Shaar Hagolan
